name: FX Cube
description: Teaching data cube: LineOfBusiness × Year × Currency facts with plan/actual FX conversion to CHF, slice-and-dice pivot tables and charts. Documented at Doc/DataMesh/DataCubes.
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24'><defs><linearGradient id='g' x1='0' y1='0' x2='1' y2='1'><stop offset='0%' stop-color='#5c6bc0'/><stop offset='100%' stop-color='#283593'/></linearGradient></defs><rect width='24' height='24' rx='5' fill='url(#g)'/><path d='M12 4l6 3v7l-6 3-6-3V7l6-3z' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='1.3' fill='none' stroke-linejoin='round'/><path d='M12 4v6m0 0l6-3m-6 3L6 7m6 7v6' stroke='#fff' stroke-width='1.1' fill='none' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>

content.description: A minimal data cube for learning: facts keyed by LineOfBusiness × Year × Currency with a local-currency Amount. FX conversion to the group currency (CHF) at plan or actual rates; slice-and-dice pivot tables, stacked and pie charts; an Edit form and a New-Fact dialog whose Line of Business is picked from the FutuRe/LineOfBusiness dimension NODES via the MeshNodePicker. Full walkthrough: Doc/DataMesh/DataCubes.
